context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies and fixes two issues in a Namecheap Terraform configuration: (1) that nameservers and record blocks are mutually exclusive and cannot appear in the same resource, and (2) that nameserver values must be lowercase.

checklist.name: Nameservers only — no record blocks
checklist.description: The final main.tf resource does NOT contain any record {} blocks alongside the nameservers list (they are mutually exclusive)

checklist.name: Record block removed
checklist.description: The incorrect A record block from the draft has been removed from the nameservers resource

checklist.name: Lowercase nameservers
checklist.description: All nameserver values are fully lowercase (e.g., "nora.ns.cloudflare.com", NOT "Nora.NS.Cloudflare.COM")

checklist.name: Provider source preserved
checklist.description: The required_providers block still specifies source = "namecheap/namecheap" with version ">= 2.0.0"

checklist.name: Both nameservers present
checklist.description: Both Cloudflare nameservers (nora.ns.cloudflare.com and rod.ns.cloudflare.com) are present in the nameservers list
